anu-√car to walk or move after or along;
to follow, pursue, seek after;
to follow out, adhere to, attend;
to behave:
Caus. -cārayati, to let or cause to traverse:
Intens. p. -carcūryamāṇa, continuing following,  RV. x, 124, 9.

results.rendered_html:
anucar 1 P.
1 To follow, pursue, go after; to serve, attend or wait upon; pitroḥ pādānanucaran  K. 368  serving.
2 To traverse, seek after, go through, wander.
3 To conduct oneself, behave.
